scripts.build: tsc && api-extractor run --local --verbose && npm run build:cleanup
scripts.build:cleanup: shx mv dist/index.d.ts ./index.d.ts.tmp && shx mv dist/index.d.ts.map ./index.d.ts.map.tmp && shx rm -rf dist && shx mkdir dist && shx mv ./index.d.ts.tmp dist/index.d.ts && shx mv ./index.d.ts.map.tmp dist/index.d.ts.map
